/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -march=native -Wall -Wextra -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/ffmpeg@6/lib CMakeFiles/benchmark.dir/src/benchmark/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark.dir/src/algorithms/baselines.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark.dir/src/algorithms/burstsort.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark.dir/src/algorithms/cache_oblivious.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark.dir/src/algorithms/radix.cpp.o -o benchmark
